# ClockMap { #natural_features.ClockMap }

```python
ClockMap(source, target, scale=1.0, offset_s=0.0)
```

Directed affine mapping between two clocks.

The mapping is always interpreted as
``target_time = scale * source_time + offset_s``.

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [then](#natural_features.ClockMap.then) | Compose this mapping with ``following`` in application order. |

### then { #natural_features.ClockMap.then }

```python
ClockMap.then(following)
```

Compose this mapping with ``following`` in application order.
